page_content:
VMSC - Veterinary Medical Sciences

VMSC436 Animal Health Policy and Communication (3 Credits)

Intended for upper level students in Veterinary Medicine or Animal Science as well as other students who are interested in understanding how science and politics interact and influence animal health policy and how veterinarians and animal scientists can effectively communicate science to non-scientists such as legislators and policymakers. Recommended: Completion of ANSC225 and ANSC340 recommend. Cross-listed with: ANSC436.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the AGNR-Animal & Avian Sciences department; or permission of AGNR-VA-MD Regional COL Veterinary Med. Credit Only Granted for. ANSC489A, ANSC436, or VMSC436.
